html:
Exclusive to:

Cork is a resource exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be gathered by chopping down Claw Palm Trees and is required for several Crafting recipes.

Cork can also be used to repair Wood Walls and to refuel Cork Candle Hats.

Trivia

  • Cork originally had red leaves, but the color was changed in the Quality of Life update.

Gallery

  • The old design of Cork.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cork là một tài nguyên độc quyền cho Hamlet DLC. Nó có thể được thu thập bằng cách chặt Cây Cọ Vuốt và cần thiết cho một số công thức Chế tạo.

Not wood |wheeler = A light material but not sturdy enough to make a balloon with. |choose = wigfrid}} '''Cork''' is a resource exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It can be gathered by chopping down [[Tree/Claw Palm Tree|Claw Palm Trees]] and is required for several [[Crafting]] recipes. Cork can also be used to repair [[Wood Wall]]s and to refuel [[Cork Candle Hat]]s. =={{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 4 |item2 = Iron Ore |count2 = 2 |tool = Science Machine |result = Cork Candle Hat}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 3 |item2 = Boards |tool = Science Machine |result = Cork Bat}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 2 |item2 = Rope |tool = Science Machine |result = Cork Barrel}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |item2 = Manure |tool = Science Machine |result = Claw Palm Sapling}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 6 |item2 = Cloth |item3 = Vine |count3 = 3 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Pith Hat}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 3 |item2 = Alloy |count2 = 3 |tool = Science Machine |result = Fancy Helmet}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 3 |item2 = Thunder Feather |item3 = Gold Nugget |count3 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Thunderhat}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cork |count1 = 4 |item2 = Rope |tool = Science Machine |result = Cork Bowl Canoe}} =={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Cork originally had red leaves, but the color was changed in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet#Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Cork Old.png|The old design of Cork. {{Resources}} [[vi:Gỗ Bần]]
